Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses And Documents From Deft Capital & Counties, Usa., Inc To Pltfs' Request For Production Of Documents Set One
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elnaz Massom, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: ELIZABETH STIMMEL and MARTIN STIMMEL
Edward Garcia, Jr., Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Capital & Counties USA, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted AS MODIFIED AS TO THE AREAS FOR WICH DOCUMENTS SHALL BE PRODUCED. PLAINTIFFS ELIZABETH STIMMEL and MARTIN STIMMEL's Motion To Compel Further Responses And Documents From Defendant Capital & Counties, USA., Inc. To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted, limited to the common area between Burger King and 2b bebe. Further production and a privilege log for any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be served within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Set For Trial On Sep-20-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-03-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608
